# Summary

Finetuned from pretrained default models using a RTX-3060-Ti.

**Methodology:** generated by `benchmark_checkpoints.py`, which drives each checkpoint straight through `infer.py`'s evaluation/benchmark path — i.e. each backend's own library (`ultralytics` for YOLO, `rfdetr` for RF-DETR) through the `ModelAdapter` interface, **not** the ONNX Runtime backend from `optimize.py`. None of these checkpoints are exported/optimized (no fp16/int8/pruning) — this is the raw PyTorch checkpoint straight off training. VRAM is peak CUDA memory allocated during the FPS benchmark (`torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated`).

Generated: 2026-07-15

| Model | IoU | Dice | Precision | Recall | Accuracy | FPS (RTX-3060-Ti) | Peak VRAM (MB) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| YOLO11-N-seg | 0.827 | 0.895 | 0.925 | 0.891 | 0.918 | 46.1 | 78 |
| YOLO11-S-seg | 0.835 | 0.903 | 0.935 | 0.893 | 0.921 | 44.8 | 130 |
| YOLO11-M-seg | 0.835 | 0.902 | 0.928 | 0.898 | 0.923 | 33.1 | 224 |
| YOLO26-N-seg | 0.767 | 0.833 | 0.902 | 0.819 | 0.893 | 38.9 | 77 |
| YOLO26-S-seg | 0.809 | 0.876 | 0.920 | 0.872 | 0.907 | 34.7 | 135 |
| YOLO26-M-seg | 0.791 | 0.857 | 0.892 | 0.871 | 0.894 | 34.6 | 242 |
